string.text: {=YR8DvcVZ}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK} of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, my {?PLAYER.GENDER}lady{?}lord{\?}, and I am honored to serve you.
{=GLmGX4ZG}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, one of the ancient lineages of the Gaelic Kingdoms.

{=LAMeCFwB}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME} Our family has stood in the Royal Court of the Gaelic Kingdoms and discharged its duties honorably since the first days of the Gaelic Kingdoms.

{=QgYFGYYx}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. Though one should not be too proud of one's lineage, I am glad to say that we have always taken seriously our duty to protect the common folk of the Gaelic Kingdoms.
{=DRzsgjsD}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the {CLAN_NAME}, a name you will have heard many times in the sagas of Ireland.

{=BSqMasBU}I am {CONVERSATION_CHARACTER.LINK}, of the house of {CLAN_NAME}. of the house of {CLAN_NAME}, one of the most illustrious families in the annals of Ireland. The English we have slain, and the glory we have won, is second to none.
